PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi s2,s2,2        00000000001010010000100100010011
0x0004		addi s3,s3,4        00000000010010011000100110010011
0x0008		add s2,s2,s3        00000001001110010000100100110011
0x000c		sub s3,s2,s3        01000001001110010000100110110011
0x0010		sub s2,s2,s3        01000001001110010000100100110011
0x0014		sw s2,38(s8)        00000011001011000010001100100011
0x0018		sw s3,43(s6)        00000011001110110010010110100011
0x001c		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
